item_description: Create form in HubSpot following naming convention: [Initiative] | [Description] | [Product Category] | Form | [Creator]
notes: Clone an existing similar form when possible. Update name, hidden fields, and redirect URL.

item_description: Configure hidden fields: Interested Product Model, Interested Product Category, and any campaign-specific fields
notes: Hidden fields must be set with default values. Required for Aimbase webhook to receive correct data.

item_description: Set form redirect URL to thank you page
Swap Form ID in WordPress page (get embed code from HubSpot, extract Form ID only — Portal ID stays constant)
notes: Login at airstream.com/wp-admin (credentials in 1Password). Login often fails on first attempt — try 2-3 times. After editing, clear preview cache by appending ?=randomchars to URL.

item_description: Add new form as enrollment trigger in the Thank You Email workflow for this form type
notes: Configure re-enrollment settings. Clone existing thank you email template when possible.

item_description: Add new form to the correct stage branch in CORP | Lead Nurture Plinko | General | WF | E3
workflow_reference: CORP | Lead Nurture Plinko | General | WF | E3
danger_note: Do NOT add the same form to more than one stage branch. Each form can only appear in one stage.
notes: Stage guide: Try & Buy = financing/dealer/incentive forms; Configure & Build = configurator forms; Experience Match = brochure/guide forms; Inspire = general/low-intent forms.

item_description: Add new form to the correct scoring group in HubSpot Lead Scoring (Marketing > Lead Scoring)
notes: Assign point value based on intent level. Update the scoring change log with date and description.

item_description: Add new form to enrollment triggers in CORP | Send Leads to Aimbase | General | WF | E3
workflow_reference: CORP | Send Leads to Aimbase | General | WF | E3
danger_note: CRITICAL: Select the WHITE box (new contacts only). Never select the ORANGE box — it re-enrolls all ~1.7 million existing contacts and will crash the system.
notes: This step is required for leads to reach dealers. Do not skip.

item_description: If form has a Meta lead ad equivalent, confirm Meta form name with Allison/Bennett and add to AMP | Meta Lead Form Routing | General | WF | E3
workflow_reference: AMP | Meta Lead Form Routing | General | WF | E3
notes: Do not guess Meta form names — confirm exact names from Allison or Bennett before updating.

item_description: Update lead scoring change log with date, form name, scoring group, and point value assigned
